title: More Blaze
description: In this modification, I have added new blaze elementals
body:
## A  [ geckolib ](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)  mod is required
# In this modification, I have added new blaze elementals
- The first elemental is splash, a water-type blaze whose core is the heart of the sea![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11bd5512b1ca1eb750306be7950e54f8d56cb2a3.png)
- The second blaze is his improvement, he is known as mob D, wild fire or blaze veteran![Wild Fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94428b6a888d903d1e533cc6c9e4f5cd6ca666dc.png)
- The third is the blaze of the lightning - flash elemental, it is made of copper and magic. Once he was struck by lightning and now he does not rust, throws lightning like Zeus![Flash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98383d9985b8349e56f0acdf0964539a8db3b234.png)
- The fourth blaze is an elemental loach, made of wood, wild berries and magic![bindweed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fffa98da3b49779c27f66b7b82ad7b233d368efd.png)
- The fifth blaze is Bismuth, this blaze was created by Pilager from windy peaks![bismuth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd72856b0b4074e2354497f86dfc0723b97e6fba.png)
- And the last sixth is a ghost, this blaze is tamed by a poppy, when it dies, the shard of a broken heart falls off it![Ghost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ea12128891debdef3663f43a3d1526ffc0c027.png)

O47VZVRC
